metadata.taskPrompt:
# Convert: Mood & Wellness

Convert the constrained HTML design to a pixel-perfect Flutter widget using the **stitch-flutter** skill.

## Inputs
- `.stitch/designs/mood-wellness/design.html` ‚Äî HTML design mockup (written in Flutter HTML Glossary vocabulary)
- `.stitch/designs/mood-wellness/SPEC.md` ‚Äî Screen specification
- `.stitch/system/DESIGN.md` ‚Äî Design system specification

## How It Works

The HTML mockup uses the **Flutter HTML Glossary** ‚Äî a constrained vocabulary where every HTML class and `data-*` attribute maps 1:1 to a Flutter widget. This enables mechanical, pixel-perfect conversion.

## Conversion Steps

1. **Read HTML** ‚Äî Parse `.stitch/designs/mood-wellness/design.html` and extract:
   - `:root` CSS tokens ‚Üí update `lib/theme/app_theme.dart` if new tokens found
   - `.scaffold` element tree ‚Üí this is the conversion entry point
   - `data-*` attributes ‚Üí Flutter widget parameters
   - `data-animate` attributes ‚Üí `flutter_animate` chains
   - `aria-*` attributes ‚Üí `Semantics` widgets

2. **Walk the DOM** ‚Äî Process each glossary element top-down:
   - `.scaffold` ‚Üí `Scaffold()`
   - `.app-bar` ‚Üí `AppBar()`
   - `.column` ‚Üí `Column()`
   - `.row` ‚Üí `Row()`
   - `.card` ‚Üí `Card()`
   - `.ink-well[data-route]` ‚Üí `InkWell(onTap: () => context.push(route))`
   - `.network-image` ‚Üí `CachedNetworkImage()`
   - `.icon[data-name]` ‚Üí `Icon(Icons.{name})`
   - Text classes (`.title-large`, `.body-medium`, etc.) ‚Üí `Text(..., style: textTheme.X)`
   - `data-color` ‚Üí `colorScheme.X`
   - `data-spacing` ‚Üí `AppTheme.spaceX`
   - `data-radius` ‚Üí `AppTheme.radiusX`

3. **Generate Dart** ‚Äî Write `lib/screens/mood_wellness/mood_wellness_screen.dart`:
   ```dart
   import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
   import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';
   import 'package:flutter_animate/flutter_animate.dart';
   import 'package:folio/theme/app_theme.dart';

   class MoodWellnessScreen extends StatelessWidget {
     const MoodWellnessScreen({super.key});

     @override
     Widget build(BuildContext context) {
       final theme = Theme.of(context);
       final colorScheme = theme.colorScheme;
       final textTheme = theme.textTheme;

       return Scaffold(
         // ... mechanically converted from glossary elements
       );
     }
   }
   ```

4. **Update router** ‚Äî Add route to `lib/router/app_router.dart`:
   ```dart
   GoRoute(
     path: '/mood-wellness',
     builder: (context, state) => const MoodWellnessScreen(),
   ),
   ```

5. **Verify** ‚Äî Run `dart analyze lib/screens/mood_wellness/mood_wellness_screen.dart`

## Reference Skills

- Read **flutter-building-layouts** for constraint rules (constraints down, sizes up), avoiding unbounded constraints in flex boxes, and when to use `Expanded` vs `Flexible` vs `SizedBox`.
- Read **flutter-animating-apps** for Hero transition setup, implicit vs explicit animations, and staggered animation patterns.

## Quality Gates

- **No hardcoded colors** ‚Äî `Color(0xFF...)` and `Colors.blue` are banned; use `colorScheme.X`
- **No hardcoded text styles** ‚Äî `TextStyle(fontSize: 16)` is banned; use `textTheme.X`
- **No hardcoded spacing** ‚Äî `EdgeInsets.all(16)` is banned; use `AppTheme.spaceMd`
- **No Container abuse** ‚Äî prefer `SizedBox`, `Padding`, `DecoratedBox` when Container is overkill
- **Use const** ‚Äî `const` constructor wherever possible
- **Trailing commas** ‚Äî on every parameter list

## Success Criteria

- `lib/screens/mood_wellness/mood_wellness_screen.dart` exists with valid Dart
- Uses `Theme.of(context)` for all styling (colors, text, shapes)
- No hardcoded colors, text styles, or spacing values
- Route added to `app_router.dart`
- `dart analyze` passes

gaps.description: [010-mood-wellness-03-convert] Check failed: Screen widget file exists
